title: Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle Proposal - Week Of 2026-02-23
post1Raw:
On behalf of @atlas-axis, we are submitting the Atlas Edit Weekly Cycle proposal below.

* * *

This proposal includes the following edits:

- **Update References To Amatsu GovOps To Soter Labs** - Updates the Atlas to reflect that Soter Labs is now Operational GovOps for the Amatsu Operational Executor Agent.
- **Add Governance Accessibility Reward Instances To Skybase Artifact** - Adds an Instance of the Governance Accessibility Reward Primitive to the Skybase Artifact.
- **Remove References To Starknet In Safe Harbor Document** - Removes references to Starknet from Safe Harbor documentation.
- **Align GitHub And Portal Versions Of Atlas** - Makes minor changes to align the versions of the Atlas shown in GitHub and on the Atlas Portal.

### **Updating References To Amatsu GovOps To Soter Labs**

- **Replace** `A.1.9.4.1.3.1.2.3 - Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig are two (2) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs and two (2) addresses controlled by Keel.
- **Replace** `A.1.9.4.1.3.1.2.5 - Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs and Keel can change the signers of the Solana LayerZero Freezer Multisig so long as:
        - there are four (4) signers;
        - two (2) signers are required to execute transactions; and
        - an equal number of signers are controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs and Keel.
- **Replace** `A.2.2.8.1.2.1.4.3.1 - Near-Term Process` to read as follows:
    - **Near-Term Process** *(Core)* - In the near term, Denna Labs calculates the Distribution Reward on behalf of the Support Facilitators. The Accessibility Facilitators then pay the Distribution Reward from the Distribution Reward Controller Wallet located on the Ethereum Mainnet at `0x05F471262d15EECA4059DadE070e5BEd509a4e73` within seven (7) days of the end of every month. The balance of this wallet may be topped up to 3 million USDS. This funding is subject to an Executive Vote.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.1.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 - Operational Executor Agent` to read as follows:
    - **Operational Executor Agent** *(Core)* - The Operational Facilitator and Operational GovOps for Amatsu are specified in [A.6.1.2.1 - Operational Executor Agent Amatsu](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.2.1).
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2 - Core Operator Relayer Multisig` to read as follows:
    - **Core Operator Relayer Multisig** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig has the `RELAYER_ROLE` as defined in [A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2 - Relayer Role](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2) and is jointly controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs and the Spark Assets Foundation in accordance with [A.6.1.1.1.2.1.1.3.1.1.4.3 - Spark Assets Foundation](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.1.2.1.1.3.1.1.4.3).
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig comprises the following signers:
        - Operational GovOps Soter Labs: 2 signers
        - Spark Assets Foundation (SAF): 2 signers
        - Phoenix Labs (PL): 1 signer
        
        Phoenix Labs' signer may create and propose transactions; execution requires meeting the 2/5 threshold.
        
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.5 - Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs can change the signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig at any time, so long as there are at least three (3) signers and at least two-thirds of signers are required to execute transactions.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.1.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.3.4 - Usage Standards` to read as follows:
    - **Usage Standards** *(Core)* - The signers of the Freezer Multisig should exercise their authority to freeze the Spark Liquidity Layer in the event that Spark is not complying with rules regarding Risk Capital or Asset Liability Management, or in the event of another emergency. The signers should consult with Operational GovOps Soter Labs before exercising such authority, unless such consultation would cause a delay that could result in a loss of user funds or harm to Sky or Spark. Operational GovOps Soter Labs may also ask the signers to exercise the Freezer Multisig in an emergency. The signers will work with Operational GovOps Soter Labs and, if necessary, other Ecosystem Actors, in good faith in determining whether to exercise their authority based on such request.
        
        Each action executed by the Freezer Multisig, including any function calls and their parameters, must be reported to the Sky community within a reasonable time frame through a post on the Sky Forum.
        
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 - Operational Executor Agent` to read as follows:
    - **Operational Executor Agent** *(Core)* - The Operational Facilitator and Operational GovOps for Amatsu are specified in [A.6.1.2.1 - Operational Executor Agent Amatsu](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.2.1).
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.3 - Core Operator Relayer Multisig` to read as follows:
    - **Core Operator Relayer Multisig** *(Core)* - The Core Operator Relayer Multisig has the `RELAYER_ROLE` as defined in [A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2 - Relayer Role](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.2.1.1.2), and is controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.3.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig are three (3) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.3.5 - Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs can change the signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig at any time, so long as there are at least three (3) signers and at least two-thirds of signers are required to execute transactions.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.2.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.4.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Freezer Multisig are two (2) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs, two (2) addresses controlled by Operational Facilitator Endgame Edge, and one (1) address controlled by Grove.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.2.1.2.1.1.1 - Operational Executor Agent` to read as follows:
    - **Operational Executor Agent** *(Core)* - The Operational Facilitator and Operational GovOps for Amatsu are specified in [A.6.1.2.1 - Operational Executor Agent Amatsu](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.6.1.2.1).
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig are three (3) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.2.5 - Modification` to read as follows:
    - **Modification** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps Soter Labs can change the signers of the Core Operator Relayer Multisig at any time, so long as there are at least three (3) signers and at least two-thirds of signers are required to execute transactions.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.1.3.2.6.1.2.1.2.2.3.3 - Signers` to read as follows:
    - **Signers** *(Core)* - The signers of the Freezer Multisig are two (2) addresses controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs, two (2) addresses controlled by Operational Facilitator Endgame Edge, and one (1) address controlled by Keel.
- **Replace** `A.6.1.2.1 - Operational Executor Agent Amatsu` and its subdocuments to read as follows:
    - **Operational Executor Agent Amatsu** *(Core)* - The Agent Artifact for Operational Executor Agent Amatsu will be specified in a future iteration of the Atlas. In the interim, the subdocuments herein contain key information regarding Operational Executor Agent Amatsu.
        - **Operational Executor Facilitator** *(Core)* - The Operational Facilitator for Operational Executor Agent Amatsu is Endgame Edge.
        - **Operational GovOps** *(Core)* - Operational GovOps for Operational Executor Agent Amatsu is Soter Labs.

### **Add Governance Accessibility Reward Instances To Skybase Artifact**

- **Add** a new subdocument of `A.6.1.1.4.2.7.1.1.2 - Active Instances Directory` to read as follows:
    - **Sky.money Frontend Instance Configuration Document Location** *(Core)* - This Instance’s associated Instance Configuration Document is located at **Sky.money Frontend Instance Configuration Document**.
- **Add** new subdocuments of `A.6.1.1.4.2.7.1.2 - Active Instances` to read as follows:
    - **Sky.money Frontend Instance Configuration Document** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain the Instance Configuration Document for the Sky.money Frontend Core Governance Reward Primitive Instance.
        - **Parameters** *(Core)* - The documents herein define the parameters of the Sky.money Frontend Instance of the Core Governance Reward Primitive.
            - **Reward Code** *(Core)* - `1`.
            - **Tracking Methodology** *(Core)* - This Instance uses the Tracking Methodology specified in [A.2.2.10.1.4.2.1 - Tracking Via Reward Codes](https://sky-atlas.io/#A.2.2.10.1.4.2.1).
            - **Custom Instance Parameters** *(Core)* - The documents herein define the custom parameters of the Sky.money Frontend Instance of the Core Governance Reward Primitive, if any.
                - **Integrator Recipient** *(Core) -* The Integrator is Sky.money Frontend, which is controlled by Skybase. As such, no additional Integrator payment will be made.
        - **Data Repository** *(Core)* - The documents herein contain data relevant to the Sky.money Frontend Instance of the Core Governance Reward Primitive.
            - **Core Governance Reward Payments And Transaction Records** *(Active Data Controller)* - This Document records information pertaining to payments received by Skybase for Governance Rewards associated with this Instance. This information is defined as Active Data.
                
                The Active Data is updated as follows:
                
                - The Responsible Party is Operational GovOps.
                - The Update Process must follow the protocol for 'Direct Edit'.
                - **List Of Core Governance Reward Payments** *(Active Data)*
                    
                    The payment details consist of a table where each entry represents a single payment. Each entry has the following fields:
                    
                    - Reward Period
                    - Payee (Skybase)
                    - Payment Address
                    - Amount Paid
                    - Transaction Hash
                    - Transaction Date
                - **Governance Reward Payment Address** *(Active Data)* - The Sky.money Frontend Governance Reward payment address is Skybase's SubProxy Account on Ethereum Mainnet: `0x08978E3700859E476201c1D7438B3427e3C81140`.

### **Remove References To Starknet In Safe Harbor Document**

- **Replace** `A.2.11.1.2.2.3.3 - Chains Parameter` to read as follows:
    - **Chains Parameter** *(Core)* - The `chains` parameter specifies each blockchain on which a funds rescue is authorized. For each chain, the following information must be specified: (1) the `chainId` of the chain, (2) the `assetRecoveryAddress` to which recovered funds should be sent, and (3) the `scope` of contracts on the chain that are covered by Safe Harbor. The chains are specified in the subdocuments herein.

### **Align GitHub And Portal Versions Of Atlas**

- **Update** formatting discrepancies, internal links, document numbering, and other minor related housekeeping edits as specified in the linked Pull Request: https://github.com/sky-ecosystem/next-gen-atlas/pull/178
